SiteFooter.title: System GraphRAG Public MVP
SiteFooter.tagline: GraphRAG, agent workflows, and explainable AI decisions

Query.defaultHelper: Choose a question or write your own. Keep it short and concrete.
Query.suggestionPlaceholder: Choose a question from a category…
Query.selectionLocked: Question selection is locked. Reset first to start a new question.
Query.label: Question
Query.contextBudget: Context budget: {tokens} tokens (estimated usage of selected context).

QueryStatus.idleText: Ask a simple, concrete question. We will show the answer step by step.
QueryStatus.idleAction: Choose or enter a question and submit it.
QueryStatus.loadingText: We are finding the most relevant relations right now.
QueryStatus.loadingAction: Please wait a moment while the answer is assembled.
QueryStatus.successText: Done. You can now review the answer, evidence, and useful next steps.
QueryStatus.successAction: Read the result and ask a follow-up question if anything is still open.
QueryStatus.errorText: That did not work just now.
QueryStatus.emptyText: We do not have enough matching context for that yet.
QueryStatus.emptyAction: Rephrase the question in a simpler or more specific way and try again.

NotFound.title: This page does not exist here.
NotFound.description: Check the URL or return to a stable section of the lab.
NotFound.summary: The requested path could not be matched to a stable piece of content. In most cases the slug is outdated, the locale segment is wrong, or the target page has moved.
NotFound.recoveryDescription: Use a stable entry point to get back into the lab without losing orientation.
NotFound.hint1: Check whether the locale segment and slug are correct.
NotFound.hint2: For essay links, the English source version may not exist yet.
NotFound.hint3: Use the navigation to return to a known area.
NotFound.routeHomeDescription: Return to the central overview of the lab.
NotFound.routeDemoDescription: Jump directly into the interactive pipeline and query surface.
NotFound.routeStoryDescription: Open the architecture and flow as a guided story.
NotFound.routeEssayDescription: Browse the essays and the argument chain.

ErrorPage.title: Something went wrong
ErrorPage.description: The page could not be loaded reliably right now.
ErrorPage.summary: An unexpected failure occurred during rendering or data processing. Because of that, the current page cannot be shown in a trustworthy way right now.
ErrorPage.recoveryDescription: Try the same step again first, or continue from a known stable area of the lab.
ErrorPage.hint1: Reload the page or try the same step again.
ErrorPage.hint2: If the issue persists, go back one step or restart from the navigation.
ErrorPage.hint3: The error occurred without an additional reference id.
ErrorPage.routeHomeDescription: Return to the main orientation point and restart from there.
ErrorPage.routeDemoDescription: Re-open the system flow on a stable demo route.
ErrorPage.routeStoryDescription: Switch to the explanatory story if the current page stays unstable.
ErrorPage.routeEssayDescription: Fall back to a more static content surface with essays.
